allow_version_upgrade.description: Indicates whether major version upgrades can be applied during the maintenance window.

aqua_configuration_status.description: The status of Advanced Query Accelerator (AQUA) for the cluster.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Redshift cluster.

automated_snapshot_retention_period.description: The number of days automated snapshots are retained.

availability_zone.description: The availability zone in which the cluster is created.

availability_zone_relocation_enabled.description: Indicates if the cluster can be relocated to another availability zone.

bucket_name.description: The name of the S3 bucket where logs are stored.

cluster_namespace_arn.description: The ARN of the namespace associated with the Redshift cluster.

cluster_nodes.description: A list of nodes in the Redshift cluster, including roles and IP addresses.

cluster_parameter_group_name.description: The name of the parameter group associated with the cluster.

cluster_public_key.description: The public key for the cluster.

cluster_revision_number.description: The current revision number of the cluster.

cluster_subnet_group_name.description: The name of the subnet group associated with the cluster.

cluster_type.description: The type of the cluster, e.g., single-node or multi-node.

cluster_version.description: The version of the Redshift engine running on the cluster.

database_name.description: The name of the database in the Redshift cluster.

default_iam_role_arn.description: The ARN of the default IAM role for the cluster.

elastic_ip.description: The Elastic IP address associated with the cluster.

enable_logging.description: Indicates if logging is enabled for the cluster.

encrypted.description: Indicates if the data in the cluster is encrypted.

endpoint.description: The connection endpoint for the Redshift cluster.

enhanced_vpc_routing.description: Indicates if enhanced VPC routing is enabled for the cluster.

iam_roles.description: A list of IAM roles associated with the cluster.

id.description: The unique identifier of the Redshift cluster.

kms_key_id.description: The AWS KMS key identifier used to encrypt the data.

log_destination_type.description: The destination type for logs, e.g., S3 or CloudWatch.

log_exports.description: A set of log types that are exported, e.g., connection or user activity logs.

maintenance_track_name.description: The name of the maintenance track for the cluster.

manual_snapshot_retention_period.description: The number of days manual snapshots are retained.

master_username.description: The master username for the Redshift cluster.

multi_az.description: Indicates if the cluster is deployed across multiple availability zones.

node_type.description: The type of node used in the cluster.

number_of_nodes.description: The number of compute nodes in the cluster.

port.description: The port number on which the database accepts connections.

preferred_maintenance_window.description: The weekly time range during which maintenance can occur.

publicly_accessible.description: Indicates if the cluster is publicly accessible.

s3_key_prefix.description: The prefix for the S3 bucket used for logging.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the cluster.

vpc_id.description: The VPC identifier associated with the cluster.

vpc_security_group_ids.description: A list of VPC security group identifiers associated with the cluster.
